title: Thai-Style Beef Shin Pilaf
description: A flavorful and spicy Thai dish made with tender beef shin and fragrant pilaf. This recipe is a twist on traditional Thai cuisine.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
2. Add beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Remove beef from skillet and set aside.
4. Add pilaf to skillet and cook until lightly toasted, stirring constantly.
5. Add mixed bell peppers and cook until tender.
6. Add cumin, salt, and black pepper to skillet and stir to combine.
7. Return beef to skillet and stir to combine with pilaf mixture.
8. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until beef is cooked through.
9. Stir in lime juice and serve hot.
